questions.question: Which ATM/Card concept best matches: self-service terminal enabling cash and non-cash banking transactions?
questions.explanation: ATM is defined as: self-service terminal enabling cash and non-cash banking transactions.

questions.question: What is the most accurate description of 'ATM'?
options: ATM transaction printing recent account entries
card with integrated chip for cryptographic transaction security
transaction failure due to delayed or missing response
self-service terminal enabling cash and non-cash banking transactions
questions.explanation: ATM refers to: self-service terminal enabling cash and non-cash banking transactions.

questions.question: 'ATM' belongs mainly to which ATM/Card technology area?
questions.explanation: ATM is mainly part of ATM Fundamentals.

options: Reconciliation -> self-service terminal enabling cash and non-cash banking transactions

ATM -> self-service terminal enabling cash and non-cash banking transactions
questions.explanation: Only 'ATM -> self-service terminal enabling cash and non-cash banking transactions' is correctly mapped.

questions.explanation: The requirement directly points to ATM.
